Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('MANUAL DE USUARIO EJEMPLO.pdf'\); [print\(f'=== PÁGINA {i+1} ===\\n{p.extract_text\(\)}'\) for i, p in enumerate\(pdf.pages[:30]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import PyPDF2; r=PyPDF2.PdfReader\('MANUAL DE USUARIO EJEMPLO.pdf'\); [print\(f'=== PAGINA {i+1} ===\\n{r.pages[i].extract_text\(\)}'\) for i in range\(min\(30,len\(r.pages\)\)\)]")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; break } catch {} } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \($r\) { "login status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "no response" })

PowerShell(try { $t = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/torneos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "torneos: $\($t.StatusCode\)" } catch { "torneos FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $d = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 -MaximumRedirection 0 } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; "dashboard redirect \(esperado sin sesión\): $code" })

PowerShell($resp = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { $_.Exception.Response }; "final status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; "final url: $\($resp.BaseResponse.ResponseUri\)")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); $ok = $false; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $ok = $true; break } catch {} } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \(-not $ok\) { "server not up"; exit }; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/search?q=test" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { "api/search sin sesión: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) \(401 esperado\)" }; $a = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "admin final url: $\($a.BaseResponse.ResponseUri\)")

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/search?q=test" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { "api/search sin sesión: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) \(401 esperado\)" }; $a = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/admin" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "admin resuelve a: $\($a.BaseResponse.ResponseUri\)"; $t = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/torneos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "torneos: $\($t.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/torneos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; break } catch {} } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \(-not $r\) { "server not up"; exit 1 }; "torneos: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $html = $r.Content; if \($html -match "fonts.googleapis.com"\) { "PROBLEMA: aun referencia Google Fonts" } else { "OK: sin requests a Google Fonts" }; if \($html -match "--font-space"\) { "OK: variables next/font presentes" } else { "PROBLEMA: no se ven las variables de fuente" }; if \($html -match "__variable"\) { "OK: clases de fuente en html" })

PowerShell($pages = @\("/", "/login", "/ranking", "/agenda", "/cuadros", "/jugadores"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$p -> ERROR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($staged = git diff --cached --name-only; "archivos staged: $\($staged.Count\)"; $staged | Where-Object { $_ -match "^\\.env$" }; if \($staged -contains ".env"\) { "PELIGRO .env staged" } else { ".env NO staged, OK" })
